Ficus palmijuncus is a species of tree in the family Moraceae, commonly known as the Palmijuncus tree. The Ficus palmijuncus tree has been reported to possess several health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of the Ficus palmijuncus tree include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The most common herbal preparations made with the Ficus palmijuncus tree include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
